commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=498088b5db28d0e3ffa5c0c4e38edd90103ad8e8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off `messages.tts.skipEmojiSymbols` option, config docs/metadata, shared TTS emoji/symbol stripping with an empty-after-strip guard, and TTS/tool regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +60, Tests +233, Docs +3, Generated 0. Total +296 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Partly: source inspection and PR proof show the requested behavior, but this is a feature PR rather than a current-main bug repro, and I did not run live TTS in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can preserve the contributor's implementation by porting it to the active package and refreshing generated metadata; the product decision is whether to accept the new config key.
